questionHtml: Explain the change, if any, to the potential difference between the plates.
markschemeHtml:
«from C=εAd» capacitance decreases «by factor 4 / to 3.8 × 10−11 F» ✓

«from V=qC» charge unchanged hence p.d. increases by factor 4 / to 96 «V» ✓

 

Award [1] max for a reasoning without numbers.

meta.title: Explain the change, if any, to the potential difference between the plates.
